title: APEX Supabase Automation And Orchestration Lineage Tranche Movement
objective: Execute the bounded Supabase automation and orchestration lineage tranche from the completed APEX-root decomposition plan by moving only the approved legacy orchestration SQL mechanics and coordination protocol documentation into explicit lineage homes while preserving non-authority treatment and avoiding deployment-utility, knowledge-schema, runtime, or active control-plane promotion.
active_role: APEX Automation And Orchestration Lineage Movement Operator
dependency_note: Packet 001 defined the tranche boundaries, packet 001a landed the root context, and packet 001b closed the PM/project/PSS lineage tranche. Packet 001c is the next bounded Supabase decomposition lane and is limited to automation/orchestration lineage only.
constrained_outputs: A bounded lineage-only movement pass for the approved Supabase automation and orchestration SQL mechanics and protocol documentation slices
Imported lineage assets under infra/database/source-lineage/apex-resa/automation-orchestration and docs/architecture/control-plane-lineage without changing their authority classification
An execution handoff documenting exact moved slices, preserved exclusions, and explicit lineage-only treatment
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001c moves only the approved automation and orchestration lineage slices and does not collapse deployment utilities into the same lane
Confirm the imported assets are labeled and placed as lineage or reference only, not active control-plane or database authority
Confirm knowledge-schema, PM/project/PSS lineage, deployment-utility, and archive tranches remain untouched
Confirm no runtime code, active migrations, or control-plane authority decisions are changed
sql_permission_note: Packet 001c authorizes only bounded physical movement of approved Supabase automation and orchestration lineage assets into lineage homes. It does not authorize deployment-utility promotion, knowledge-schema movement, runtime code changes, active control-plane promotion, or SQL execution.
